revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Columns-start/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Columns-start%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Column/styles.css}} The '''columns-start''' template and its child templates '''column''' and '''columns-end''' can be used to make a fixed number of columns (up to 5) that will span the entire page above a certain minimum width (100 [[Em (typography)#CSS|ems]] for 5 columns, 80 for 4, 60 for 3 and 2). Below the minimum width, each column starting from the right will gracefully display below another one of the columns. == Use == The below examples are using the templates directly, so you can see what will happen if the minimum size is reached. {{clear}} {{columns-start|num=4}} {{columns-start}} Column 1 here {{column}} Column 2 here {{columns-end}} {{column}} {{columns-start|num=3}} Column 1 here {{column}} Column 2 here {{column}} Column 3 here {{columns-end}} {{column}} {{columns-start|num=4}} Column 1 here {{column}} Column 2 here {{column}} Column 3 here {{column}} Column 4 here {{columns-end}} {{column}} {{columns-start|num=5}} Column 1 here {{column}} Column 2 here {{column}} Column 3 here {{column}} Column 4 here {{column}} Column 5 here {{columns-end}} {{columns-end}} === Parameters === Columns-start has these parameters: ; {{para|num}} : Set the number of columns. Defaults to 2. The template will work with up to 5 columns. More than that should prefer a custom implementation or another solution (such as a wikitable for tabular content or {{tl|div col}} for list content). ; {{para|class}} : Apply another class to the set of columns, such as hlist. Default is none. ; {{para|bgcolor}} : Set a background color. Default is transparent. ; {{para|width}} : Set a total width in which all columns must appear. Default is 100%. Template:Column has the same parameters where it is used as a "wrapper" template with numbered columns. Example: {{columns-start|num=2}} {{column|num=2 |1= Column 1 here |2= Column 2 here }} {{column}} {{column|num=3 | Column 1 here | Column 2 here | Column 3 here }} {{columns-end}} In the second example, be aware of the possible problem with a column that includes an equals sign. See [[Help:Templates#Equals]] for more information. Otherwise, Template:Column must be used as above with Template:Columns-start. === Example === This is an example from [[:en:List of Indonesia-related topics|List of Indonesia-related topics]]: {{columns-start|num=4}} '''Palaces in Indonesia''' * [[:en:Istana Bogor|Istana Bogor]] * [[:en:Istana Luwu|Istana Luwu]] * [[:en:Istana Maimun|Istana Maimun]] * [[:en:Istana Merdeka|Istana Merdeka]] * [[:en:Istana Negara, Jakarta|Istana Negara, Jakarta]] * [[:en:Istana Wakil Presiden|Istana Wakil Presiden]] {{column}} '''Prisons''' * [[:en:Kambangan Island|Kambangan Island]] {{column}} '''Shopping malls''' * [[List of Indonesia-related topics#Shopping malls in Jakarta|Shopping malls in Jakarta]] * [[List of Indonesia-related topics#Shopping malls in Bandung|Shopping malls in Bandung]] * [[List of Indonesia-related topics#Shopping malls in Surabaya|Shopping malls in Surabaya]] * [[List of Indonesia-related topics#Shopping malls in Batam|Shopping malls in Batam]] {{column}} '''Towers''' * [[:en:Monumen Nasional|Monumen Nasional]] * [[:en:Wisma 46|Wisma 46]] {{columns-end}} === Limitations === {{tracked|T75182}} {{tracked|T23485}} Using headings inside {{tl|column}} in its wrapper form functions so long as there is some content beneath the 2nd and later heading. Secondly, headings will not carry an edit link. The below table may wrap (i.e. not display as columns) but displays the issue. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Content ! Functional but missing edit links ! Non-functional (missing content) |- | Wikitext | {{column |1= ==== Ex. heading 1 ==== ABC |2= ==== Ex. heading 2 ==== DEF }} | {{column |1= ==== Ex. heading 3 ==== |2= ==== Ex. heading 4 ==== }} |- | Rendered | {{column |1= ==== Ex. heading 1 ==== ABC |2= ==== Ex. heading 2 ==== DEF }} | {{column |1= ==== Ex. heading 3 ==== |2= ==== Ex. heading 4 ==== }} |} == See also == {{column-generating template families}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Multi-column templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
